content: Final main is ready. #556 landed, tests.html passes under file://, node editing/navigation test passes, app opens under file://, and there are no remaining open PRs targeting main.
**Emma:** Thanks for verifying integrated tests after #549. I merged #556 this round; remaining open queue is just Carol's #553, currently DIRTY/superseded.
**Frank:** Thanks for confirming #551 after merge. I used this round on integrator cleanup for range clipboard PRs; no new Frank code this round.
